originContent: Easily write and execute PHP code directly in PhpStorm/IDEA as if using `laravel artisan tinker`. Enjoy the convenience of running code snippets with full access to your Laravel classes, enhanced by your IDE’s autocompletion, syntax highlighting, and error inspections.
translatedContent: Easily write and execute PHP code directly in PhpStorm/IDEA as if using `laravel artisan tinker`. Enjoy the convenience of running code snippets with full access to your Laravel classes, enhanced by your IDE’s autocompletion, syntax highlighting, and error inspections.

originContent: Access all plugin actions via `Tools -> Laravel Tinker` or use the default shortcut `ctrl + Shift + T` to let Tinker intelligently determine your intent (open, run, etc.).
translatedContent: Access all plugin actions via `Tools -> Laravel Tinker` or use the default shortcut `ctrl + Shift + T` to let Tinker intelligently determine your intent (open, run, etc.).

originContent: - [💡 GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Roboroads/laravel-tinker/issues): Submit feature requests and bug reports
translatedContent: - [💡 GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Roboroads/laravel-tinker/issues): Submit feature requests and bug reports

originContent: - [🙏 Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/roboroads) / [GitHub Sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/Roboroads): Support the project if you find it helpful ❤️
translatedContent: - [🙏 Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/roboroads) / [GitHub Sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/Roboroads): Support the project if you find it helpful ❤️

originContent: - [🔌 Plugin Page](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/14957-laravel-tinker/): Download for PHPStorm or IDEA
translatedContent: - [🔌 Plugin Page](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/14957-laravel-tinker/): Download for PHPStorm or IDEA

originContent: - [🔗 Share](https://linktr.ee/laraveltinkerplugin): Share the plugin with your network
translatedContent: - [🔗 Share](https://linktr.ee/laraveltinkerplugin): Share the plugin with your network

originContent: The plugin also works outside Laravel projects - just ensure `psy/psysh` is required in your project for basic functionality (with some limitations).
translatedContent: The plugin also works outside Laravel projects - just ensure `psy/psysh` is required in your project for basic functionality (with some limitations).

originContent: > Significant contributors will be acknowledged here.
translatedContent: > Significant contributors will be acknowledged here.

originContent: My experience with Kotlin is limited, so I *tinkered* (😏) this together. Any tips or feedback are welcome in the [Issues Tab](https://github.com/Roboroads/laravel-tinker/issues) - or even better, submit a PR!
translatedContent: My experience with Kotlin is limited, so I *tinkered* (😏) this together. Any tips or feedback are welcome in the [Issues Tab](https://github.com/Roboroads/laravel-tinker/issues) - or even better, submit a PR!

originContent: Want to contribute? Every positive contribution is appreciated!
translatedContent: Want to contribute? Every positive contribution is appreciated!
